text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One gloomy morning in the lead up to the Arima
Kinen, I head to my office to plan out a training
regimen.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You're here already?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I open the door, Hishi Amazon is busy at
work decorating the room.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, y'know... It's the twenty-fifth, right? I
wanted to surprise you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I figured it'd be fun to walk into your office and boom! Winter wonderland.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Nah, it's all right. I didn't plan this well.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I had no idea you would come in so early.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is going to be the backdrop for
Hishi Amazon's huge showdown with Narita Brian
this year.
choice_data_list: I wanted to make sure you'd be prepared, so...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I, uh... Hey, I really appreciate that. Thank
you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm really excited for the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She smiles bashfully as she says it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Man, I nearly forgot to give you this. You've
gotta open a present, eh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pull off the wrapping to find she's gifted me a
neck warmer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I quickly try putting it on, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What are you doing, Teach? It goes around
your stomach, not your neck.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What am I going to do with you? Come on, hold
still.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She pulls the stretchy fabric of the belly warmer wide and shimmies it down my torso.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Maybe it needs to go a little lower? Yeah,
there we go!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sweet, the size is perfect! Looks good on you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It comes with a pocket on the inside for those
disposable heat packs. That should come in
handy when it gets really cold.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's chilly sittin' out there from the spectator
seats, right? I don't want my partner to catch a
cold!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What a thoughtful gift. I'll be sure to make good
use of it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: So, um, about your present...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I feel strangely self-conscious because of all the weird things they were saying.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's just... My dorm residents kept makin' fun of
me while I was knitting the thing!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you knitting a scarf? You're so talented!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, this is supposed to be a present for
someone.

text_block_list.name: Miho Student B
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Is it for your special someone?!

text_block_list.name: Miho Student A
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no waaay! I mean, she's making it by hand,
so it has to be!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wha—as if! S-stop runnin' your mouths, you
dummies!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You know what? Forget it! Just take this already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the box to find a hand-knit scarf with a
fine and intricate pattern on it. It's so like her to
make something like this.
choice_data_list: Thank you. I promise to treasure it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly put it around my neck. The length is
perfect, and it's soft to the touch.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa. It suits you a lot better than I expected it
to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This day with Hishi Amazon is one to remember.
